title: cynanchum rugosum
intro: Cynanchum rugosum, also known as Chinese swallowwort, is a perennial plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially preventing cancer cell growth. Cynanchum rugosum can be prepared into herbal teas, extracts, or infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
